title: Load Balancing Quiz
description: Test your knowledge about the critical role of load balancing and high availability in modern web applications.

questions.question: What is the primary role of a 'Load Balancer' in a web application?
options: To store all of the application's users.
To distribute incoming network traffic across multiple servers to ensure high availability and responsiveness.
To automatically generate a backup of the data.
To hide the application's IP address.

questions.question: Which of these is a popular open-source software load balancer?
options: Express.js
Nginx
Mongoose
React Router

questions.question: What is the 'Round Robin' algorithm in the context of load balancing?
options: A way to encrypt files using a secret key.
Requests are distributed sequentially and evenly among all healthy servers.
A type of database indexing.
A way to automatically compress files.

questions.question: What is 'Sticky Sessions' and why might you need it?
options: A way to ensure a user's browser session doesn't expire.
A load balancing feature that ensures a single user's requests are always sent to the same server, which is useful for session-based authentication.
A type of database indexing.
A way to automatically compress files.

questions.question: What is 'SSL Offloading'?
options: To make the database faster.
When the load balancer handles the expensive task of decrypting HTTPS traffic before passing the request to the application servers.
To automatically generate a backup of the data.
To improve the user experience.
